ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loot_buckets" (
  "bucket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot bucket */,
  "bucket_name" TEXT /* Name of the loot bucket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loot bucket */,
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game event associated with the loot bucket */,
  "max_item_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity of items allowed in the loot bucket */,
  "max_item_value" TEXT /* Maximum total value of items allowed in the loot bucket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loot bucket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loot bucket was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bucket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_buckets_game_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the game event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of game event (e.g., quest, raid, daily login) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the game event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the game event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the game event */,
  "event_rewards" TEXT /* Rewards offered for completing the game event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot item */,
  "bucket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot bucket the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the loot bucket */,
  "probability" TEXT /* Probability of the item being selected from the loot bucket */,
  "gear_score" TEXT /* Gear score range for the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., gear, consumable) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_value" TEXT /* Value of the item */,
  "item_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_items_bucket_id FOREIGN KEY ("bucket_id") REFERENCES loot_buckets ("bucket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_items_rarity FOREIGN KEY ("rarity") REFERENCES item_rarities ("rarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_items_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the item type (e.g., gear, consumable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_rarities" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item rarity */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the item rarity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item rarity */,
  "rarity_level" INTEGER /* Level of the item rarity (e.g., 1 for common, 2 for rare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot condition */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot item the condition applies to */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., character level, quest completion) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition (e.g., level range, quest ID) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_operator" TEXT /* Operator for the condition (e.g., =, <, >) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_conditions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES loot_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "current_gear_score" INTEGER /* Current gear score of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the character was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the character's last login */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot distribution event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game event that triggered the distribution */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character who received the loot */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item distributed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the distribution */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution (e.g., quest reward, raid drop) */,
  "loot_bucket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot bucket used for the distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distributions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distributions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES loot_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distributions_loot_bucket_id FOREIGN KEY ("loot_bucket_id") REFERENCES loot_buckets ("bucket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distributions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the user role (e.g., 1 for player, 2 for admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the user permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user permission */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Level of the user permission (e.g., 1 for view, 2 for edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_bucket_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "bucket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot bucket the log entry is for */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add_item, remove_item) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_bucket_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES loot_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_bucket_logs_bucket_id FOREIGN KEY ("bucket_id") REFERENCES loot_buckets ("bucket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_bucket_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item stat */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item the stat is for */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the stat (e.g., attack, defense) */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the stat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stat */,
  "stat_category" TEXT /* Category of the stat (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_stats_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES loot_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_item_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the item set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item set */,
  "bucket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot bucket the set belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the set was last updated */,
  "set_type" TEXT /* Type of the item set (e.g., gear, consumable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_item_sets_bucket_id FOREIGN KEY ("bucket_id") REFERENCES loot_buckets ("bucket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_items" (
  "set_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set item */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item set the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item in the set */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item in the set */,
  "item_position" INTEGER /* Position of the item in the set (e.g., 1 for first item) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES loot_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_items_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES loot_item_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_distribution_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot distribution rule */,
  "loot_bucket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot bucket the rule applies to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition for the rule */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the rule (e.g., 0.5 for 50% chance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distribution_rules_loot_bucket_id FOREIGN KEY ("loot_bucket_id") REFERENCES loot_buckets ("bucket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distribution_rules_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES loot_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_distribution_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot distribution outcome */,
  "loot_distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot distribution the outcome belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item in the outcome */,
  "probability" TEXT /* Probability of the outcome (e.g., 0.5 for 50% chance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distribution_outcomes_loot_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("loot_distribution_id") REFERENCES loot_distributions ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_distribution_outcomes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES loot_items ("item_id")
)
